Beachfront Location: Karpaha Sands in Pasikuda offers direct beachfront access with Kalkudah Beach just a 2-minute walk away. Guests enjoy stunning sea views and a serene beach setting.
Exceptional Facilities: The resort features an infinity swimming pool, sun terrace, and open-air bath. Additional amenities include a spa, fitness centre, and free bicycles for exploring the surroundings.

Dining Experience: A romantic restaurant serves French, local, and international cuisines, including vegetarian, vegan, and gluten-free options.
